title: EWUR
description: EWUR - Best  optimization pvp tweaks and more | 1.21.8+| Fabric
body:
![EWUR about the modpack ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acdcc8a6e3425390e0b764428c8751d105f50812.png)

💕The modpack is aimed at creating the best, most fun and comfortable game creation for you. A lot of settings will help you with this!
```
  🍻OPTIMIZATION ?
```

**YES, Ewur is a pack aimed at smooth gameplay without FPS drops.**
- Supercharged Performance: Experience significant FPS boosts with the power of Sodium.
- COOL Visuals: Immerse yourself with stunning shader support provided by Iris.
- Vanilla Gameplay: Enjoy the classic Minecraft experience without any gameplay altering modifications.
- play on any server with this modpack.
- Minimal load on your PC use modpack even on a weak laptop.

```
❤️‍🔥PVP?
```

**YES, we succeeded and here the pack also adds tweaks for pvp players**
- small fire items totems.
- optimization of crystals and food.
- armor hud
- dark interface
- strike optimization and much more!


```
 🍷TITLES
```

**Modpack starts its creation with version 1 21 8.**
Modpack plans to be updated to the following versions.
The modpack will be improved in all its aspects.
 **😎EWUR - better than a regular modpack**
